title: Warm Smoky Vietnamese Beef Pho Bo
description: A pungent and crowd-pleasing Vietnamese dish featuring coriander and smoke, this low-calorie-friendly pho bo is a cheese-pull delight

ingredients.name: beef bones
ingredients.notes: preferably oxtail or beef neck bones

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Roast the beef bones in the oven for 30 minutes
In a large pot, char the onion and ginger over high heat
Add the star anise, cinnamon sticks, and coriander seeds to the pot and toast for 1 minute
Add the beef brisket to the pot and cook until browned
Add the fish sauce and soy sauce to the pot and stir to combine
Add 4 quarts of water to the pot and bring to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 hour
Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions
Assemble the pho bo by placing noodles in a bowl, adding sliced beef, and ladling the hot broth over the top
